label: DeFi Atomic Bundles
description: DeFi-specific atomic bundle builder with Flash Loan Arb and Leverage Long pre-built templates.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 availableOn=[bundles]. 0.4 No any types or @ts-ignore (string 'any' in UI text is not a type). 0.5 No mock imports in widget file; DEFI_TEMPLATES from lib/config/services/defi-bundles.config. 0.6 N/A — widget uses local DefiOp[] state (no async fetch); template selection is the pre-data state. 0.7 Empty state present: pre-template state (showTemplates+empty ops), and ops.length===0+!showTemplates guard. 0.8 N/A — no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary covers render errors. 0.9 No dead code. Fixed: now imports useBundlesData() for readOnly flag; readOnly wired to disable Add Operation, Clear all, Simulate on Tenderly, Execute Bundle buttons in batch mode.

l1.notes: 1.1 PARTIAL — widget manages its own DefiOp[] local state rather than reading from a domain data context hook. This is intentional: DefiOp is a different data model from BundleStep (used by the other 4 bundles widgets). No defi-atomic-specific data context exists. readOnly flag now sourced from useBundlesData(). Recommend creating a DefiAtomicBundlesDataContext in a follow-up task to fully satisfy 1.1. 1.2-1.6 N/A at widget level — the widget's operations are user-authored local state. Scope filtering applies to readOnly (batch mode) which is now wired. 1.7 All reference data (DEFI_OPERATIONS, DEFI_TOKENS, DEFI_TEMPLATES, GAS_ESTIMATES, gasToUsd) in lib/config/services/defi-bundles.config — correct location.

l4.notes: Known L4 issues: Simulate on Tenderly and Execute Bundle buttons have no onClick handlers — dead buttons. Needs wiring in L4.

knownIssues: Widget uses local DefiOp[] state instead of a domain data context hook — recommend DefiAtomicBundlesDataContext (L1.1 partial)
Simulate on Tenderly button has no onClick handler — dead button (L4 scope)
Execute Bundle button has no onClick handler — dead button (L4 scope)
findings: Now imports useBundlesData() for readOnly flag from bundles context
readOnly wired to disable Add Operation, Clear all, Simulate on Tenderly, Execute Bundle in batch mode
All DeFi reference data correctly placed in lib/config/services/defi-bundles.config
